prompt: I need to create a Terraform configuration for a new GCP project that will host a containerized application. The project needs: GKE and Cloud SQL APIs enabled, IAM bindings for a dev team group and a CI/CD service account, Shared VPC attachment to an existing host project, CMEK encryption for compute and storage, and org policies to disable serial port access and external IPs on VMs. Use Cloud Foundation Fabric modules. Save the output to outputs/project.tf
